name: kinematicsCalc
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.maxReach === 'string'
output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.workspace === 'string'
output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.type === 'string'
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data.joints. Field-aligned 2026-06-28 to RoboticsActionPanel.tsx: the result card renders degreesOfFreedom / maxReach / workspace / type EXACTLY plus joints[].{joint,type,angle,length} (the J{joint} {type} {angle}° / {length}mm list). maxReach = sum of joint lengths in 'Nmm'; workspace = 'full-6DOF' at >=6 DOF else 'N-DOF limited'; type = articulated (>=6) / SCARA-like (>=3) / simple. Fail-CLOSED: non-finite angle/length fall to finite defaults (angle 0, length 100, range [-180,180]) via Number.isFinite — a poisoned input can never leak Infinity into maxReach. A non-array joints coerces to [] (honest empty message), never throws.
